title: Spanish Political Discourse Benchmark (SPDB)
description: Stratified benchmark of Spanish political discourse with discourse-unit annotations for pragmatic function and political fallacies. Status: under development (v0.1.0-dev). Annotated dataset splits are not yet publicly released.
notes: Development snapshot. Sync with zenodo/releases/ on each archive. Dataset DOI will be registered at v1.0.0 release.
